title: solanum nigrum var. induratum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. induratum, also known as the rough bitters or prickly nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum nigrum plant, a flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. induratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and protect against certain diseases. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
